reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar con buenos baños en la estacion.
El parque con sus mesas y bancos está bueno pero otrora era mejor ya que había fogones y parrillas para hacer un asadito

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place with good restrooms at the station.
The park with its tables and benches is good, but it used to be better because it had fire pits and grills for barbecues.

reviews.comment:
La primera parada en sentido ascendente en Ruta 2. Atención rápida, amable, baños limpios y local de compras abierto -con limitaciones- pero para destacar ya que las restricciones hicieron estragos con muchos lugares. Me quedó por preguntar hasta qué hora sigue abierto.

(Translated by Google)
The first stop heading up Route 2. Quick and friendly service, clean restrooms, and an open shop—with some limitations—but worth noting since the restrictions have devastated many places. I still need to ask what time they close.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhZ3RmOEFREAE

reviews.comment:
Que se yo, es una estacion de servicio comun y corriente... Te atienden rapido, no fui a los baños asique no puedo decir si estan limpios o sucios, la playa se veia bien aunque hacia un frio que te congelaba el alma y no me puse a reparar demasiado en el estado general de la estacion. Cargue nafta y  me fui. Un saludo para el playero que me presto la WiFi para poder pagar con la app de YPF porque no hay señal de ninguna compañía en ese rincon olvidado del mundo!

(Translated by Google)
I don't know, it's just a regular gas station... The service was quick, I didn't use the restrooms so I can't say if they were clean or dirty, the forecourt looked nice even though it was freezing cold and I didn't pay much attention to the overall condition of the station. I filled up and left. A shout-out to the attendant who let me use the Wi-Fi to pay with the YPF app because there's no signal from any company in that forgotten corner of the world!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNheVBXR2JBEAE
